project_type: Turborepo monorepo with Next.js 15 apps and shared packages
build_system: pnpm + turbo. Each app has its own tsconfig. Turbo tasks: build, typecheck, test, lint.
test_framework: Vitest (node environment). QuantMail tests in src/__tests__/ and backend/__tests__/. Config includes api-v2 and backend test dirs.
verification_instructions: 1. Run pnpm turbo typecheck --filter=@quant/quantmail to verify types. 2. Run pnpm turbo test --filter=@quant/quantmail to verify tests. 3. Check no dead onClick handlers remain.
setup_instructions: Node modules already installed. Branch feat/wave1-quantmail-wireup created from current HEAD.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network. Node 22, pnpm, turbo 2.9.14 available. No Docker needed for validation.
contribution_requirements: Gates must pass (typecheck + test). Real JSX, no fake components. Use @quant/shared-ui components. Brand tokens from @quant/brand. Loading/error/empty/success states. Responsive 360-1440px. Dark mode support.

key_patterns.app_router_pattern: Next.js 15 App Router under src/app/. Layout wraps children in QueryProvider + AppProviders (theme + Cmd+K).
key_patterns.api_proxy_pattern: src/app/api/drive/* proxies to Fastify backend at QUANTMAIL_BACKEND_URL (default :3001, should be :3010). Pattern: forward headers, call fetch to backend, return NextResponse.json.
key_patterns.shared_ui_usage: Import from @quant/shared-ui: AppShell, Sidebar, TopBar, Card, Badge, Button, Input, FormField, TextArea, SearchInput, LoadingState, ErrorState, EmptyState, Skeleton, ThemeProvider, CommandPaletteUI, Modal, Toast, Avatar.
key_patterns.api_client_pattern: Singleton QuantMailApiClient in src/services/api-client.ts. Has auth, email, repo, CI, calendar, contacts, AI methods. baseUrl defaults to localhost:3001 (BUG - should be 3010). Token set via setTokens().
key_patterns.hooks_pattern: Custom hooks in src/hooks/ using @tanstack/react-query: useInbox, useEmail, useDrive, useGit, useSearchEmails.
key_patterns.types_pattern: Central types in src/types/index.ts. Pages Router screens re-define types locally (BUG).
key_patterns.existing_components: EmailComposer.tsx (181 LOC, real send), RichTextEditor.tsx (651 LOC), CodeEditor.tsx, PipelineView.tsx, CalendarGrid.tsx, FileManager.tsx, etc. in src/components/.

directory_structure: apps/quantmail/src/app/ = App Router (current: /, /compose, /api/drive). apps/quantmail/src/pages/ = Pages Router (13 screens, rich but unstyled/unwired). apps/quantmail/src/services/ = api-client + services. apps/quantmail/src/hooks/ = react-query hooks. apps/quantmail/src/components/ = real rich components (EmailComposer, RichTextEditor, etc). apps/quantmail/src/types/ = central type definitions. apps/quantmail/backend/ = Fastify backend with Prisma (port 3010, 12 route groups, 30+ services). packages/shared-ui/ = shared component library.
